name: MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc.
summary: Overview We design, develop and manufacture differentiated semiconductor products and solutions for the Industrial and Defense (I&D), Data Center and Telecommunications (Telecom) industries for customers who demand high performance, quality and reliability. We are headquartered in Lowell, Massachusetts, with operational facilities throughout North America, Europe and Asia.
